prompt: Generate a world map infographic showing a direct flight route from the city in Image 1 to the city in Image 2.
prompt_refined: Generate a world map infographic. The infographic must visually depict a direct flight route originating from the city shown in Image 1 (Tehran) and terminating at the city shown in Image 2 (Toronto). Clearly highlight both cities on the map and represent the flight path as a distinct line or arrow connecting them.
objects: Direct flight path represented as a line
